title: Stretches | StretchLab
meta_description: StretchLab provides one-on-one stretches combining dynamic and static stretch techniques for mobility, flexibility, pain relief, and injury prevention.
body_markdown:
# 
the stretches 
![aerial of 50 year old female smiling with comfort & relief, receiving hamstring stretches from expert flexologist on padded bench at stretchlab studio](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/stretches-header-480x360.png)
## 
ONE-ON-ONE
STRETCHES
Standard 5O Minute Stretch >
This session is a deep and extensive full body stretch that focuses on all major muscle groups and extremities. It's great for improving your range of motion and flexibility, while also loosening tight muscles and easing stiff joints.
![young middle aged man lying on padded stretch therapy bench with flexologist performing quad stretch on leg](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/stretches-50-minute-1040x585.jpg)
Maintenance 25 Minute Stretch >
This session concentrates only on major muscle groups and can help alleviate muscle tightness. It's great for when you don't have enough time for a full body stretch and need muscle relief.
![smiling fit middle aged man in athleticwear with female stretch practitioner performing piriformis stretch on glute and hamstring in bright and modern facility](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/stretches-25-minute-1040x585.jpg)
![StretchLab trained stretch practitioner using Normatec compression therapy leg attachment on StretchLab member's legs](https://www.stretchlab.com/hs-fs/hubfs/FINAL_S8A6370.jpg?width=1600&height=1067&name=FINAL_S8A6370.jpg)
### NORMATEC™ COMPRESSION THERAPY
Normatec™ is a pneumatic compression therapy designed to help improve circulation, improve flexibility and improve muscle recovery. The Normatec™ leg attachments utilize compressed air to massage the leg muscles and mobilize fluid.
Benefits:
  * Increased blood flow
  * Better range of motion
  * Recovery post-workout or long days


Members get one complimentary session, plus the option to add-on more Normatec™ sessions to your existing membership. Inquire with your studio to learn more!
##  Trained Flexologists 
Our proprietary Flexologist Training Program is an intensive and thorough series that each of our Flexologists must complete prior to servicing guests at StretchLab.   
  
During their required lessons and hands-on training, our Flexologists broaden their education and understanding of the muscular system, conduct hands-on learning regarding proper assisted stretching technique, and prepare to work with a variety of clients of all ages, body types, and physical needs. 
![](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/stretchlab.com/jpgs/Stretches/Stretches_CertifiedFlexologists.jpg)
MOST POPULAR MONTHLY MEMBERSHIPS
4 Sessions
**25 or 50 Minute  
**  

4 stretch sessions each month. Pick from 25-minutes or 50-minutes.
8 Sessions
**25 or 50 Minute  
**  
8 stretch sessions each month. Book 25 or 50-minute sessions. Our most popular membership, for good reason - consistency means results! Plus, ask about the option to add family members to your membership.  

12 Sessions
**25 or 50 Minute  
**  
12 sessions each month. Book 25 or 50-minute sessions. Enjoy the flexibility of frequent visits, and stay healthy with the whole family - with this membership, you can share with up to four family members.  

**Select your favorite flexible membership options, built to complement YOUR schedule and YOUR body's needs.**  
**Create a free profile to browse at[members.stretchlab.com](https://members.stretchlab.com/auth/login?amp_device_id=vxWIj84tCD4Dreh0tUobTA&amp_device_id=5b5oOkBTTkImhZ9qMo9JM7)**
